docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,884.19 FILED BY GOELDNER, CAROLYN AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, LISBETH ARTOLA, ALFREDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-07-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-12-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUANCE IS FOR PLAINTIFF TO SERVE DEFENDANT, ALFREDO ARTOLA AND TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE.
